data.enContent:
Brief introduction


If your application needs to obtain user privacy data (such as products and orders) when interconnecting with the international open platform, in order to ensure the security and privacy of user data, your application needs to obtain the user's authorization, that is, to obtain the access token (i.e., the original SessionKey) to access the user data. In this case, your app needs to guide the user through the process of "login authorization" with the international site account. This process uses the internationally accepted OAuth 2.0 standard protocol as the user authentication and authorization protocol.

At present, the international website platform supports the method of using code to obtain tokens, and the specific operations are as follows.


Service Environment

Authorization steps

1. Splice the authorization URL

To join a user authorization, you need to access the URL, as shown in the following examples:

https://open-api.alibaba.com/oauth/authorize?response_type=code&force_auth=true&redirect_uri=${app call back url}&client_id=${appkey}


Note: Use the AppKey and callback URL of your app to replace the client_id and redirect_uri.

Parameter description:

2. Guide the user to log in to authorize

Guide the user to access the above authorization URL through the browser, and the following login page will pop up. The user enters the account and password and clicks the "Authorize" button to enter the authorization page.

3. Get the code

On the page above, if the user clicks the "Authorize" button, TOP will return the authorization code to the callback address, and the application can obtain and use the code in exchange for access_token (note that the validity period of the code is very short, try to use the program (rather than manual copying) to exchange for access_token immediately after obtaining the code, otherwise the code will expire soon);


4. Get the access_token

4.1 Obtain tocken through the SDK, the following example is the input parameters required when using the SDK

invoke ：/auth/token/create get the access_token

API documentation：

https://open.alibaba.com/doc/api.htm?spm=a2o9m.11193531.0.0.4c9c4bd6mLyMmC#/api?cid=2&path=/auth/token/create&methodType=GET/POST


Example of input parameters:

IopClient client = new IopClient(url, appkey, appSecret);
IopRequest request = new IopRequest();
request.setApiName("/auth/token/create");
request.addApiParameter("code", "0_2DL4DV3jcU1UOT7WGI1A4rY91");
IopResponse response = client.execute(request, Protocol.GOP);
System.out.println(response.getBody());
Thread.sleep(10);

5. Save access_token

access_token expires at the end of the expire_in period, so please keep your access_token properly before it expires.


6. Example of access_token return in exchange


{
"refresh_token_valid_time": 4804563378176,
"havana_id": "17379911544",
"expire_time": 4804563378176,
"locale": "zh_CN",
"user_nick": "test1234",
"access_token": "50000000528VP2cqMgQ9h1pUf85GuepqZzuGae1891407feu3qVtfglCKlIW",
"refresh_token": "50001001928fJIbsqf6eaUuYiFkuhxlrsHiaCr116e71adsfJuZpon3oieGw",
"user_id": "200042362",
"account_platform": "seller_center",
"refresh_expires_in": 3153599922,
"expires_in": 3153599922,
"sp": "ae",
"seller_id": "200042362",
"account": "test1234@126.com",
"code": "0",
"request_id": "212a77bf16509634562801070"
}

Return value parameter description:

Note:

  1. The self-developed ISV allows merchants to calculate the expiration time of authorized tokens as follows: call interface time + token validity duration, and the expiration time of each new token generated will change.
  2. The expiration time of the authorized token in the commercial ISV service market is calculated as follows: the time when the merchant purchases the service + the token is valid, and the expiration time of each new token generated will not change.

In addition, the generated new token and the old token will point to the same authorization, and can still be used even if the old token has not expired.


Activate the authorization step

Note: To authorize an ISV in the service marketplace, please ignore this step and do not support calling this API.


1.Use “/auth/token/refresh” Reactivate access token

The structure of the return value obtained by using this API is the same as that obtained by the access_token method. You will get new "access_token" and "refresh_token", please save the "refresh_token". Note: The validity period of the access_token will be reset, but the refresh_token validity period will not be reset. After the refresh_token expires, the merchant needs to authorize the generation of new access_token and refresh_token.


Note:

1. Merchants do not need to re-authorize until the access_token expires.

2. It can only be used to reactivate access_token if the refresh_token expiration time "refresh_expires_in" is greater than 0.

3. If the access_token needs to be reactivated, it is recommended to do so 30 minutes before the access_token expires.
data.author: WB667915
data.cnContent:
一、简介

如果您的应用和国际站开放平台对接时需要获取用户隐私数据（如商品、订单等），为保证用户数据的安全与隐私，您的应用需要取得用户的授权，即获取访问用户数据的授权令牌 Access Token （即原来的SessionKey）。这种情况下，您的应用需要引导用户完成使用国际站账号“登录授权”的流程。该流程采用国际通用的OAuth2.0标准协议作为用户身份验证与授权协议。

目前国际站平台支持使用code获取token的方法，具体操作如下。


二、服务环境

Environment

Service address

oversea environment

https://open.alibaba.com/oauth/authorize


三、授权步骤

1. 拼接授权URL

拼接用户授权需访问url ，示例及参数说明如下：

https://open-api.alibaba.com/oauth/authorize?response_type=code&force_auth=true&redirect_uri=${app call back url}&client_id=${appkey}

注意：请使用自己应用的AppKey和回调URL进行替换“client_id”和“redirect_uri”。

参数说明：


2. 引导用户登陆授权

引导用户通过浏览器访问以上授权url，将弹出如下登录页面。用户输入账号、密码点“授权”按钮，即可进入授权页面。


3.获取code

上图页面，若用户点“授权”按钮后，TOP会将授权码code 返回到了回调地址上，应用可以获取并使用该code去换取access_token（注意code的有效期很短，尽量使用程序（而非手工复制）获取到代码后立刻换取access_token，否则code很快失效）；


4.换取access_token

4.1 通过sdk获取 tocken，以下样例为使用SDK时所需传入参数

调用: /auth/token/create 获取access_token。

API 文档：

https://open.alibaba.com/doc/api.htm?spm=a2o9m.11193531.0.0.4c9c4bd6mLyMmC#/api?cid=2&path=/auth/token/create&methodType=GET/POST

入参示例：

String url = "https://open-api.alibaba.com/rest/auth/token/create?";
String appkey = "34248607";
String appSecret = "4456567";
String signMethod = "sha256";
String apiName = "/auth/token/create";
String code = "3_34248607_aWiK1ViYaaGYoAqPhA2Zr3TH3";
IopClient client = new IopClientImpl(url, appkey, appSecret);
IopRequest request = new IopRequest();
request.setApiName(apiName);
request.addApiParameter("code", code);
IopResponse response = client.execute(request, Protocol.GOP);
System.out.println(response.getGopResponseBody());
4.2通过HTTP的方式获取tocken

请求url全链接：

https://open-api.alibaba.com/rest/auth/token/create?/rest/auth/token/create&app_key=500060&partner_id=iop-sdk-java-20181207&sign_method=sha256&sign=0CFC8089502503930CEA617C8485BB35CA2E9EF35331F818EB8C84189AC78C39&timestamp=1731567783358

注意：在header中添加 Accept-Encoding gzip


5.保存access_token

access_token会周期（expire_in）结束后过期，请在过期之前妥善保存access_token。


6.换取access_token返回示例

从原开放平台迁移的ISV特别注意: 原开放平台中的user_id 对应此处返回值中的havana_id

{
"access_token": "50000000308cMOJlbruD10392482q9ICPaRUBh3izEmpguOg8EfthLUviFwz0lB",
"country": "CN",
"refresh_token": "50001001308t0UUrueHP18393743ZuPf8GFUftwwiHiJnyDuUmh0mPRcPOEV5cT",
"account_platform": "seller_center",
"refresh_expires_in": 25920000,
"expires_in": 25920000,
"account": "evan.yinjun002111@gmail.com",
"code": "0",
"request_id": "213c50c417262055301715003",
"_trace_id_": "0bbb3da517262055301683993ed159"
}


返回值参数说明：

注意：

自研isv允许商家授权token到期时间计算方式为：调用接口时间+token有效时长，每次生成的新token到期时间会改变。

商用isv服务市场授权token到期时间计算方式为：商家购买服务时间+token有效时长，每次生成的新token到期时间不会改变。

另外，生成的新token和老token都会指向同一份授权，在老token没有过期的情况下，仍可以使用。


四、激活授权步骤

注意：服务市场授权isv请忽略该步骤，不支持调用该接口。

1. 使用 “/auth/token/refresh” 重新激活access token

使用该API所获得的返回值结构与获取access_token方法返回值相同。你将获得新的“access_token”和“refresh_token”，请保存好“refresh_token”。注意：access_token的有效期将重置，但是refresh_token有效期不会重置。在refresh_token过期之后，商家需要授权生成新的access_token和refresh_token。

注意：

1）在access_token过期前商家无需重复授权。

2）只有当refresh_token的过期时间“refresh_expires_in”大于0时才可以用于重新激活access_token。

3）如果access_token需要被重新激活，建议在access_token过期前30分钟进行该操作。
